title: BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yahindutse AFRICAN GLOBAL LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd v. PRIME INSURANCE Ltd.
text:
BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd
yahindutse AFRICAN GLOBAL LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd v.
PRIME INSURANCE Ltd.
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE – RCOMAA 00108/2024/CA (Ngagi, P.J.,) 10 Ukuboza
2025]
Amategeko agenga ububasha bw’Inkiko – Inzitizi – Impamvu zimwe – Mu gusuzuma niba
umuburanyi yaratsinzwe mu nkiko zombi zabanje hashingiwe ku mpamvu zimwe, harebwa
icyaburanwaga n’imitekerereze ya buri rukiko (raisonnement juridique) mu kugaragaza impamvu
zashingiweho, kugira ngo rugere ku cyemezo rwafashe, hitawe ku kureba niba ingingo
zaburanywe mbere ari zo zagarutsweho mu bujurire kandi ko inkiko zombi zazishubijeho mu buryo
bumwe.
Amategeko agenga ububasha bw’Inkiko – Impamvu zimwe – Mu gusuzuma ko impamvu
zashingiweho umuburanyi atsindwa mu nkiko zombi ari zimwe, hatarebwa niba ibimenyetso
ababuranyi batanze ku rwego rwa mbere ari byo byatanzwe no mu rwego rw’ubujurire, cyangwa
ko zakoresheje amagambo amwe, ahubwo harebwa niba inkiko zombi zarashubije ku buryo bumwe
ingingo zirebana n’ikiburanwa
Incamake y’ikibazo: Sosiyete HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd na sosiyete PRIME INSURANCE
Ltd zagiranye amasezerano y’ubwishingizi bw’ibyakwangirikira mu bwikorezi bw’ibikoresho bya
gisirikare byavaga Soudan biza Kigali.
Nyuma yuko HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd yegukanye isoko ryo kuzana ibyo bikoresho bya
gisirikari, na yo yahaye akazi sosiyete BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTIS Ltd
nk’umwikorezi wabigize umwuga (transporter), kugira ngo izazane ibyo bikoresho.
Mu gihe ibyo bikoresho yari ibigejeje mu bwato, hagaragaye ibimenyetso by’inkongi y’umuriro
mu gice cyo hasi cy’ubwato, cyari gipakiyemo ibikoresho birimo ibifaru (APC), maze
ababishinzwe babasha kuwuzimya, ubwato bukomeza urugendo.
Ubwato bugeze Dar-es-Salaam, HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd, BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND
LOGISTICS Ltd na PRIME INSURANCE Ltd zashyizeho inzobere kugira ngo bakore igenzura
ku byangiritse.
PRIME INSURANCE Ltd ivuga ko nyuma y’igenzura, impuguke zose zemeje ko inkongi
z’umuriro zafashe mu gice cyo hasi cy’ubwato, maze hemezwa ko ibyangiritse byose bifite agaciro
ka 327.433.580Frw.
PRIME INSURANCE Ltd ivuga kandi ko nyuma yo kwishyura ibyangiritse, yandikiye
BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd nk’umwikorezi iyisaba kuyisubiza
327.433.580Frw yishyuwe HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd, ariko ntiyayishyura, bituma iregera
Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi irusaba gutegeka BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS
RWANDA Ltd kuyishyura no kuyiha indishyi zitandukanye.

BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd mu kwiregura ivuga ko yari yahawe
akazi na HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd ikaba yari umukozi wayo, bityo ko Itegeko ritemerera
umwishingizi gukoresha uburenganzira bwo gusimbura, kandi ko mu kwishyuza indishyi haregwa
umukozi w’uwafashe ubwishingizi, irangiza ivuga ko hagomba kubaho icyemezo cy’Urukiko
cyemeza ugomba kuryozwa igihombo.
Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi rwasanze BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd
nk’umwikorezi wabigize umwuga yagize ubuteganye buke, bityo rwemeza ko igomba kwishyura
PRIME INSURANCE Ltd amafaranga angana na 327.433.580Frw y’indishyi yishyuye
HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd, n’inyungu zingana 3.929.203Frw, n’ay’ikurikiranarubanza.
BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd ntiyishimiye imikirize y’urubanza
maze ijurira mu Rukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi, ivuga ko inenga kuba Urukiko rubanza
rwarayitegetse kwishyura PRIME INSURANCE Ltd amafaranga yishyuye HORIZON
LOGISTICS Ltd n’andi yaciwe, isaba ko gukurirwaho amafaranga y’ibyakoreshejwe mu rubanza
yategetswe kwishyura.
PRIME INSURANCE Ltd yireguye ivuga ko ntaho BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS
RWANDA Ltd yahera ihakana ko atari yo igomba kwishyura kuko ari ihame ko umwikorezi ageza
ibintu yatwaye aho bigomba gushyitswa bikiri muri conditions yabihawemo, kandi akaba agomba
kuryozwa igihombo cyose cyabaho mu gihe umuzigo yahawe ukiri mu maboko ye, bityo ko
ubujurire nta shingiro bufite.
Nyuma y’isesengura, Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi rwemeje ko ubujurire bwa sosiyete
BOLLORE nta shingiro bufite, bityo ko icyemezo cyafashwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi
kidahindutse.
BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yahindutse AFRICAN GLOBAL
LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yajuririye mu Rukiko rw’Ubujurire, maze hasuzumwa inzitizi
y’iburabubasha bw’uru Rukiko yatanzwe na PRIME INSURANCE Ltd ishingiye ku kuba
AFRICAN GLOBAL LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yaratsinzwe mu nkiko zombi zabanje
hashingiywe ku mpamvu zimwe.
Abahagarariye sosiyete BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd biregura
kuri iyi nzitizi bavuga ko nta shingiro ifite, kuko inkiko zombi zabanje mu gufata icyemezo
zashingiye ku mpamvu zitandukanye, bavuga kandi ko ku kibazo kijyanye no kumenya icyateje
impanuka, inkiko zombi zagize imitekerereze itandukanye, bityo ko ubujurire bukwiye bwakirwa
kuko impamvu zashingiweho n’inkiko zombi kuri iki kibazo atari zimwe.
Abahagarariye sosiyete BOLLORE bavuga kandi ko ku kibazo kijyanye n’indishyi
mbonezamusaruro, inkiko zombi zitashingiye ku mpamvu zimwe, kuko Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi
rwashingiye gusa ku ngingo ya 144 y’Itegeko N° 45/2011 ryo ku wa 25/11/2011 rigenga
amasezerano, naho Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi rushingira ko uwishyuye afite uburenganzira
bwo kuryoza undi watumye yishyura, bityo ko ubujurire buri mu bubasha bw’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire.

Incamake y’icyemezo: 1.Mu gusuzuma niba umuburanyi yaratsinzwe mu nkiko zombi zabanje
hashingiwe ku mpamvu zimwe, harebwa icyaburanwaga n’imitekerereze ya buri rukiko
(raisonnement juridique) mu kugaragaza impamvu zashingiweho, kugira ngo rugere ku cyemezo
rwafashe, hitawe ku kureba niba ingingo zaburanywe mbere ari zo zagarutsweho mu bujurire kandi
ko inkiko zombi zazishubijeho mu buryo bumwe.
2. Mu gusuzuma ko impamvu zashingiweho umuburanyi atsindwa mu nkiko zombi ari zimwe,
hatarebwa niba ibimenyetso ababuranyi batanze ku rwego rwa mbere ari byo byatanzwe no mu
rwego rw’ubujurire, cyangwa ko zakoresheje amagambo amwe, ahubwo harebwa niba inkiko
zombi zarashubije ku buryo bumwe ingingo zirebana n’ikiburanwa.
Inzitizi ifite ishingiro.
Amategeko yashingiweho:
Itegeko Nº 30/2018 ryo ku wa 02/06/2018 rigena ububasha bw’inkiko, ingingo ya 52.
Imanza zifashishijwe:
Urubanza RCOMAA 0048/16/CS rwa RRA na SODAR Ltd rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga ku
wa 19/05/2017;
Urubanza RS/INJUST/RCOM 00002/2020/SC rwa Road Solutions Pavement Products na MAIL
CO Ltd, rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga ku wa 29/9/2020;
Urubanza RS/INJUST/RCOM 00003/2020/SC, rwa SANLAM Assurance Générales Plc na
UNIVERSITY OF RWANDA (UR), rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga ku wa 27/11/2020.
Urubanza
I.IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] Ku wa 05/07/2021, HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd na PRIME INSURANCE Ltd zagiranye
amasezerano y’ubwishingizi bw’ibyakwangirikira mu bwikorezi bw’ibikoresho bya gisirikare
byavaga Soudan-El Fasher-Darfur-Dar-es-Salaam-Kigali. Nyuma yuko HORIZON LOGISTICS
Ltd yegukanye isoko ryo kuzana ibyo bikoresho bya gisirikari, na yo yahaye akazi BOLLORE
TRANSPORT AND LOGISTIS Ltd nk’umwikorezi wabigize umwuga (transporter), kugira ngo
izazane ibyo bikoresho.
[2] BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTIS Ltd yapakiye ibyo bikoresho mu makamyo
ibicisha mu nzira y’ubutaka (inland transport) bigana ku cyambu cya Soudan. Ku wa 17/08/2021,
mu gihe ibyo bikoresho yari ibigejeje mu bwato, mu gihe cya saa moya za mu gitondo, hagaragaye
ibimenyetso by’inkongi y’umuriro mu gice cyo hasi cy’ubwato, cyari gipakiyemo ibikoresho
birimo ibifaru (APC), hageragezwa uburyo bwo kuzimya uwo muriro no gufata ingamba zatuma
ikibatsi cyawo kitagera mu gice cyo hejuru cy’ubwato mu rwego rwo kugabanya ibyakwangirika,
bigeze ku wa 18/08/2021, na none mu gice cyo hasi cy’ubwato hagaragaramo indi nkongi
y’umuriro, ababishinzwe babasha kuwuzimya ubwato bukomeza urugendo.

[3] Ubwato bugeze Dar-es-Salaam, HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd, BOLLORE TRANSPORT
AND LOGISTICS Ltd na PRIME INSURANCE Ltd zashyizeho inzobere kugira ngo bakore
igenzura ku byangiritse.
[4] PRIME INSURANCE Ltd ivuga ko nyuma y’igenzura, impuguke zose zemeje ko inkongi
z’umuriro zafashe mu gice cyo hasi cy’ubwato, zaturutse ku kuba ibyo bikoresho byarapakiwe mu
buryo bubi, kuko basanze inkongi y’umuriro yaraturutse kuri batiri zari zicometse, ndetse harimo
ibifaru byarimo mazutu, maze mu gihe ubwato bwagendaga bwizunguza mu mazi bitewe
n’imiterere y’amazi, bigatuma izo batiri zicometse zitera ibishashi byavutsemo inkongi y’umuriro,
zikanemeza ko ibyangiritse byose bifite agaciro ka 327.433.580Frw. Isobanura ko nyuma yo
kwishyura ibyangiritse, yandikiye BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd
nk’umwikorezi iyisaba kuyisubiza 327.433.580Frw yishyuwe HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd,
ntiyayishyura, bituma iregera Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi irusaba gutegeka BOLLORE TRANSPORT
AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd kuyishyura 327.433.580 Frw no kuyiha indishyi zitandukanye.
[5] BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd mu kwiregura kuri icyo
yavuze ko nta shingiro gifite, kuko yari yahawe akazi na HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd ikaba yari
umukozi wayo, bityo ko Itegeko ritemerera umwishingizi gukoresha uburenganzira bwo
gusimbura, mu kwishyuza indishyi haregwa umukozi w’uwafashe ubwishingizi, kandi ko PRIME
INSURANCE Ltd atari yo ifite ububasha bwo kwemeza nyirabayazana w’amakosa yabaye kugira
ngo ishobore gukoresha ububasha bw’isimbura mu masezerano, kandi ko hagomba kubaho
icyemezo cy’Urukiko cyemeza ugomba kuryozwa igihombo.
[6] Mu rubanza RCOM 01296/2023/TC rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi ku wa 12/04/2024,
urwo Rukiko rwasanze BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd
nk’umwikorezi wabigize umwuga yaragize ubuteganye buke, rwemeza ko igomba kwishyura
PRIME INSURANCE Ltd 327.433.580Frw y’indishyi yishyuye HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd,
kuyiha inyungu zingana 3.929.203Frw, 100.000Frw y’ikurikiranarubanza, 500,000 Frw
y’igihembo cya Avoka, ikanayisubiza 20.000 Frw y’igarama yatanze irega.
[7] BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru
rw’Ubucuruzi, mu bujurire bwayo inenga kuba Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi rwarayitegetse kwishyura
PRIME INSURANCE Ltd amafaranga yishyuye HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd n’andi yaciwe
rushingiye ku kuba yarapakiye ibifaru birimo mazutu nticomore batiri, kandi izo nshingano zari
iza HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd, ikavuga ko ibyo atari byo byateye inkongi y’umuriro, ko ahubwo
yatewe n’uko ibifaru byashituwe igihe babyatsaga babikura aho byari biri babijyana ku bwato;
bityo PRIME INSURANCE Ltd ikaba itaragombaga gukoresha ihame rya « subrogation », kuko
BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yari umukozi wa HORIZON
LOGISTICS Ltd. Isoza isaba ko amafaranga y’ibyakoreshejwe mu rubanza yategetswe kwishyura
yakurwaho, ahubwo ikagenerwa ayo yakoresheje ku rwego rubanza ndetse no ku rwego
rw’ubujurire.
[8] PRIME INSURANCE Ltd yireguye ivuga ko ubujurire bwa BOLLORE TRANSPORT
AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd nta shingiro bufite, kuko ari ihame ko umwikorezi ageza ibintu
yatwaye aho bigomba gushyitswa bikiri muri conditions yabihawemo, kandi akaba agomba
kuryozwa igihombo cyose cyabaho mu gihe umuzigo yahawe ukiri mu maboko ye, ko kandi
inkongi y’umuriro yatwitse ibyo bikoresho yaturutse ku makosa yayo yo gupakira nabi ibyo

bikoresho, nk’uko byagaragajwe na raporo y’impuguke ko yapakiye ibifaru birimo mazutu ndetse
na batiri zicometse. Ivuga kandi ko BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd
yagombaga kuyisubiza agaciro k’ibyangiritse yayishyuriye HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd kangana
na 327.433.580Frw, ndetse ikanayatangira inyungu kuko yasabwe kuyishyura ntibikore ku gihe,
ikayivutsa inyungu yari kuzabona iyo iza kuba yarayashoye mu bindi bikorwa. Bityo ko ntaho
BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yahera ihakana ko atari yo igomba
kwishyura.
[9] Mu rubanza RCOMA 00280/2024/HCC rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi ku wa
25/11/2024, urwo Rukiko rwemeje ko ubujurire bwa BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND
LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd nta shingiro bufite, ko ubujurire bwuririye ku bundi bwatanzwe na
PRIME INSURANCE Ltd na bwo nta shingiro bufite, ko icyemezo cyafashwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubucuruzi mu rubanza RCOM 01296/2023/TC kidahindutse. Rutegeka BOLLORE
TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd kwishyura PRIME INSURANCE Ltd 500,000
Frw y’igihembo cya Avoka, 100.000 Frw y’ikurikiranarubanza, yiyongera kuyagenwe ku rwego
rwa mbere.
[10] BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yajuririye uru Rukiko,
ubujurire bwayo bwandikwa kuri RCOMAA 00108/2024/CA. Urubanza rwaburanishijwe mu
ruhame ku wa 03/12/2025, AFRICAN GLOBAL LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yahoze yitwa
BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd ihagarariwe na Me Sangano Yves
hamwe na Me Ngilinshuti David, naho PRIME INSURANCE Ltd ihagarariwe na Me
BAGOMORA Bigirumwami Charles hamwe na Me Iyakaremye Bosco, hasuzumwa inzitizi
y’iburabubasha bw’uru Rukiko yatanzwe na PRIME INSURANCE Ltd ishingiye ku kuba
AFRICAN GLOBAL LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yaratsinzwe mu nkiko zombi zabanje
hashingiywe ku mpamvu zimwe.
[11] Mu iburanisha ry’urubanza abahagarariye PRIME INSURANCE Ltd bamenyesheje
Urukiko ko BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yahindutse AFRICAN
GLOBAL LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd, abahagarariye BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND
LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd nabo barabyemera ko ariko bimeze.
II.IBIBAZO BIGIZE URUBANZA N’ISENGURA RYABYO
Kumenya niba AFRICAN GLOBAL LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yaratsinzwe mu nkiko
zombi zabanje hashingiwe ku mpamvu zimwe ku buryo ubujurire bwayo budakwiye
kwakirwa
[12] Abahagarariye PRIME INSURANCE Ltd bashingiye ku ngingo ya 52, igika cya 3,
y’Itegeko Nº 30/2018 ryo ku wa 02/06/2018 rigena ububasha bw’inkiko, iteganya ko ubujurire
bwa kabiri budashobora kwakirwa ku muburanyi watsinzwe mu nkiko zombi zabanje hashingiwe
ku mpamvu zimwe, no ku murongo watanzwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga mu rubanza
RC/INJUST/RCOM 00002/2020/SC rwaciwe ku wa 25/09/2020, haburana ROAD SOLUTION
PAVEMENTS PRODUCT na MAILCO Ltd, ndetse n’umurongo watanzwe mu rubanza Nº
RS/INJUST/RCOM 00003/2020/SC haburana SANLAM ASSURANCE GENERALES Plc na
UNIVERSITY OF RWANDA, batanze inzitizi y’iburabubasha bw’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire, basaba

ko ubujurire bwatanzwe na AFRICAN GLOBAL LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd butakirwa ngo
busuzumwe, kuko yatsinzwe mu nkiko zombi zabanje hashingiwe ku mpamvu zimwe.
[13] Basobanura ko mu rubanza RCOM 01296/2023/TC rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi ku
wa 12/04/2024, hasuzumwe ikibazo cyo kumenya niba BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND
LOGISTIS RWANDA Ltd yategekwa kwishyura PRIME INSURANCE Ltd 327.433.580 Frw
y’indishyi yishyuye HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd, n’ikijyanye no kumenya niba indishyi
mbonezamusaruro zisabwa zikwiye gutangwa, ko ibyo bibazo ari nabyo byasuzumwe n’Urukiko
Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi mu rubanza RCOMA 00280/2024/HCC.
[14] Basobanura kandi ko ku ngingo irebana no kumenya niba AFRICAN GLOBAL
LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yategekwa kwishyura PRIME INSURANCE Ltd indishyi zingana na
327.433.580 Frw yishyuwe HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd, Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi rwayisuzumye
mu bika bya 28 na 29 by’urubanza RCOM 01296/2023/TC rusanga BOLLORE TRANSPORT
AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd ikwiye kwishyura PRIME INSURANCE Ltd 327.433.580 Frw
nk’uko biteganywa n’ihame rya “subrogation” riteganywa n’Itegeko rigenga imirimo
y’ubwishingizi, ko ibyo ivuga ko iryo hame ridakwiye gushingirwaho, ngo kuko yari umukozi wa
HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd nta gaciro bikwiye guhabwa, kuko itari umukozi (employee) ahubwo
yari ″transporter″, ko kandi kuba inkongi y’umuriro yabaye yaratewe n’ubuteganye buke bwayo,
igomba kuryozwa indishyi zijyanye na byo; ko ibyo byagarutsweho mu rubanza RCOMA
00280/2024/HCC rujuririrwa, aho mu isesengura Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi rwakoze mu bika
bya 39-41, rwasanze ibyo BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd ivuga ko
hadakwiye gukoreshwa “subrogation” kuko yari umukozi wa HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd nta
gaciro bikwiye guhabwa, kuko itigeze iba “employee”, naho mu gika cya 56, rusanga ikwiye
kwishyura kuko yagize ubuteganye buke. Bityo ko inkiko zombi zemeje ko ikwiye kwishyura
327.433.580 Frw kuko yagize ubuteganye buke.
[15] Bakomeza basobanura ko ku kibazo kijyanye no kumenya niba indishyi mbonezamusaruro
zisabwa zikwiye gutangwa, mu isesengura Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi rwakoze mu bika bya 33 na 34
by’urubanza RCOM 01296/2023/TC, rwasanze BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS
RWANDA Ltd ikwiye gutegekwa kwishyura indishyi mbonezamusaruro zingana na 3.929.203
Frw, hashingiwe ku kuba yarakerererwe kwishyura, kuko yandikiwe isabwa kwishyura ariko
ntiyishyure, ko ibyo ari nabyo byashingiweho n’Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi mu rubanza Nº
RCOMA 00280/2024/HCC nk’uko bigaragara mu gika cya 65 cy’urwo rubanza. Bityo ko
BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yahindutse AFRICAN GLOBAL
LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yatsinzwe mu nkiko zombi hashingiwe ku mpamvu zimwe.
[16] Abahagarariye BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd biregura kuri
iyi nzitizi bavuga ko nta shingiro ifite, kuko inkiko zombi zabanje mu gufata icyemezo zashingiye
ku mpamvu zitandukanye. Basobanura ko Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi rwemeje ko BOLLORE
TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd iryozwa indishyi rushingiye ko yagize
ubuteganye buke, kuko yapakiye ibifaru byarimo mazutu na batiri zirimo umuriro, ko yagombaga
gukuramo mazutu no kureka batiri zigashyiramo umuriro, ko ariko Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi
mu kuyitegeka gusubiza PRIME INSURANCE Ltd amafaranga yishyuye HORIZON LOGISTICS
Ltd rushingira kuri raporo y’umuhanga igaragaza ko impanuka yatewe no gushitura ibifaru no
kuba insinga zabyo zari zifite ibibazo. Bityo ko kuba ku kibazo kijyanye no kumenya icyateje

impanuka, Inkiko zombi zaragize imitekerereze itandukanye, bituma ubu bujurire bukwiye
bwakirwa.
[17] Basobanura kandi ko mu gika cya 27 n’icya 28 by’urubanza RCOM 01296/2023/TC,
Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi rwashingiye icyemezo cyarwo ku mpamvu y’uburyo ibikoresho byari
bipakiye no ku kuba hari ibifaru byari birimo mazutu BOLLORÉ TRANSPORT AND
LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yagombaga kumenya uko bipakiye no ku kuba yaragombaga kubanza
kureka bateri zigashiramo umuriro, naho mu gika cya 47, n’icya 54 by’urubanza RCOMA
00280/2024/HCC, Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi rushingira icyemezo cyarwo ku mpamvu yo
kuba nta bugenzuzi buhuriweho bwakozwe kugira ngo hamenyekane niba ibifaru n’imodoka
byaragejejwe mu bwato nta kibazo bifite. Bityo ko impamvu zashingiweho n’inkiko zombi kuri
iki kibazo atari zimwe.
[18] Bavuga kandi ko ku kibazo kijyanye n’indishyi mbonezamusaruro, inkiko zombi
zitashingiye ku mpamvu zimwe, kuko Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi rwashingiye gusa ku ngingo ya 144
y’Itegeko N° 45/2011 ryo ku wa 25/11/2011 rigenga amasezerano, naho Urukiko Rukuru
rw’Ubucuruzi rushingira ko uwishyuye afite uburenganzira bwo kuryoza undi watumye yishyura.
Bityo ko impamvu zashingiweho n’inkiko zombi atari zimwe, ubujurire bwayo bukaba buri mu
bubasha bw’uru Rukiko.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
[19] Ingingo ya 52, igika cya 3, y’Itegeko Nº 30/2018 ryo ku wa 02/06/2018 rigena ububasha
bw’inkiko, iteganya ibikurikira: “Icyakora kandi ubujurire bwa kabiri ntibushobora kwakirwa ku
manza z’ababuranye bemera ibyo baregwa, cyangwa ku muburanyi watsinzwe mu nkiko zombi
hashingiwe ku mpamvu zimwe.”
[20] Nk’uko byafashweho umurongo mu manza zaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga, mu gusuzuma
niba umuburanyi yaratsinzwe mu nkiko zombi zabanje hashingiwe ku mpamvu zimwe, harebwa
icyaburanwaga n’imitekerereze ya buri rukiko (raisonnement juridique) mu kugaragaza impamvu
zashingiweho, kugira ngo rugere ku cyemezo rwafashe, hitawe ku kureba niba ingingo
zaburanywe mbere ari zo zagarutsweho mu bujurire kandi ko inkiko zombi zazishubijeho mu
buryo bumwe 11. Ibi kandi binumvikanisha ko ibyaburanwe mu rwego rwa mbere ari nabyo
ubusanzwe bigomba kuburanwa mu rwego rw’ubujurire hashingiwe ku ihame risanzwe mu micire
y’imanza rivuga ko umucamanza wo mu rwego rwa mbere yita ku igenzura ry’ibimenyetso
n’amategeko ugereranyije n’ikiburanwa, naho umucamanza wo mu rwego rw’ubujurire akibanda
cyane cyane ku kugenzura niba amategeko ku rwego rwa mbere yarubahirijwe uko bikwiye
hakurikijwe ibisobanuro n’ibimenyetso byari byatanzwe muri urwo rubanza, byaba ngombwa
agakosora aho bikenewe2.
1 Reba urubanza RS/INJUST/RCOM 00002/2020/SC rwaciwe ku wa 29/9/2020 haburana Road Solutions Pavement
Products na MAIL CO Ltd.
2 Reba igika cya 23 cy’urubanza RS/INJUST/RCOM 00003/2020/SC rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga ku wa
27/11/2020, haburana SANLAM Assurance Générales Plc na UNIVERSITY OF RWANDA (UR).

[21] Na none mu rubanza RCOMAA 0048/16/CS rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga ku wa
19/05/2017, haburana RRA na SODAR Ltd, urwo Rukiko rwasobanuye ko mu gusuzuma ko
impamvu zashingiweho umuburanyi atsindwa mu nkiko zombi ari zimwe, hatarebwa niba
ibimenyetso ababuranyi batanze ku rwego rwa mbere ari byo byatanzwe no mu rwego
rw’ubujurire, cyangwa ko zakoresheje amagambo amwe, ahubwo harebwa niba inkiko zombi
zarashubije ku buryo bumwe ingingo zirebana n’ikiburanwa.
[22] Nk’uko bigaragara mu rubanza RCOM 01296/2023/TC rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi
ku wa 12/04/2024, urwo Rukiko rwasuzumye ibibazo bibiri by’ingenzi ari byo kumenya niba
BOLLORE’TRANSPORT&LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yategekwa kwishyura PRIME
INSURANCE Ltd 327.433.580Frw y’indishyi yishyuwe HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd, n’icyo
kumenya niba indishyi mbonezamusaruro zisabwa zikwiye gutangwa. Mu bujurire, mu rubanza
RCOMA 00280/2024/HCC rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi ku wa 25/11/2024, urwo
Rukiko na rwo rwagarutse ku bibazo by’ingenzi bisa n’ibyasuzumwe ku rwego rwa mbere, icyo
kumenya niba BOLLORE TRANSPORT&LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd itari ikwiye gutegekwa
kwishyura PRIME INSURANCE Ltd 327.433.580 Frw y’indishyi zishyuwe HORIZON
LOGISTICS Ltd n’icyo kumenya niba BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA
Ltd idakwiye gutegekwa kwishyura indishyi mbonezamusaruro.
[23] Ku kibazo cyo kumenya niba BOLLORE TRANSPORT & LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd
yategekwa kwishyura PRIME INSURANCE Ltd 327.433.580Frw y’indishyi yishyuwe
HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd, Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi rwemeje ko BOLLORE TRANSPORT &
LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yishyura 327.433.580 Frw yishyuwe HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd
rushingiye ku ngingo ya 128 y’Itegeko N° 030/2021 ryo ku wa 30/06/2021 rigenga imitunganyirize
y’umurimo w’ubwishingizi, no kuba BOLLORE TRANSPORT & LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd
nk’umwikorezi wabigize umwuga ( transporter) yaragize ubuteganye buke kuko bitewe
n’imiterere y’ibyo yari agiye gutwara yagombaga kumenya niba nta kibazo uburyo bipakiyemo
bushobora guteza. Rwasanze kandi ibyo BOLLORÉ TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA
Ltd iburanisha ko ari umukozi wa HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd nta shingiro bifite, kuko
amasezerano agaragaza ko ari umwikorezi (transporter).
[24] Kuri iki kibazo, Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi rwemeje ko BOLLORE TRANSPORT &
LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yishyura 327.433.580 Frw yishyuwe HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd
rushingiye ku ngingo ya 128 y’Itegeko N° 030/2021 ryavuzwe haruguru, no kuba BOLLORE
TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd nk’umwikorezi wabigize umwuga yaragazi
ubuteganye buke, kuko ari yo irebwa cyane n’ibyagombaga gukorwa kugira ngo imizigo yahawe
iyigeze aho iyijyanye nta kibazo kibayeho. Rwasanze kandi ibyo BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND
LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd iburanisha ko yari subcontractor wakoreraga HORIZON
LOGISTICS Ltd, nta shingiro bifite, kuko amasezerano agaragaza ko BOLLORE TRANSPORT
AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd na HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd ari impande ebyiri zagiranye
amasezerano (contractors).
[25] Urukiko rurasanga kuri iki kibazo BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS
RWANDA Ltd yahindutse AFRICAN GLOBAL LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yaratsinzwe mu
nkiko zombi n’uko yagize ubuteganye buke kuko ari yo yagombaga kumenya ibyagombaga
gukorwa kugira ngo imizigo yahawe iyigeze aho iyijyanye nta kibazo kibayeho.

[26] Ku kibazo kijyanye no kumenya niba BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS
RWANDA Ltd idakwiye gutegekwa kwishyura indishyi mbonezamusaruro, Urukiko
rw’Ubucuruzi rwasanze BOLLORÉ TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS itarishyuye PRIME
INSURANCE RWANDA Ltd amafaranga y’indishyi yari yishyuye HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd
kandi byagaragaye ko yagize ubuteganye buke; bityo rero kuba urega asaba ko yahabwa indishyi
bikaba bifite ishingiro, kuko PRIME INSURANCE Ltd RWANDA Ltd iyo yishyurwa ayo
mafaranga yari kuyakoresha akabyara inyungu. Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi narwo rwasanze
inyungu BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yategetswe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubucuruzi zifite ishingiro, kuko, kubera ubuteganye buke yagize, igomba gusubiza PRIME
INSURANCE Ltd amafaranga yishyuye HORIZON LOGISTICS Ltd, kandi ikaba itarishyuriye
igihe ayo mafaranga kuko yandikiwe na PRIME INSURANCE Ltd ariko ntiyishyure, ko kandi
rwemeranya rwemeranya n’Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi ku bisobanuro rwatanze mu gika cya 33 na 34
by’urubanza rujuririrwa, hanyuma rwemeza ko inyungu zingana na 3.929.203Frw zemejwe
n’Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi zifite ishingiro, zikaba zitagomba kugumaho.
[27] Urukiko rurasanga, kuri iki kibazo cya kabiri cyasuzumwe n’inkiko zombi, BOLLORE
TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yahindutse AFRICAN GLOBAL LOGISTICS
RWANDA Ltd yaratsinzwe mu nkiko zombi hashingiwe ku kuba uburyozwe buhama BOLLORE
TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd, kandi iyi ikaba yaratinze kwishyura
amafaranga yishyuzwaga.
[28] Ku byerekeye ibyo abahagarariye BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS
RWANDA Ltd bavuga ko batatsinzwe mu nkiko zombi hashingiwe ku mpamvu zimwe, kuko
Urukiko rw’Ubucucuruzi rwashingiye icyemezo cyarwo k’uburyo ibikoresho byari bipakiye no
kuba hari ibifaru byari birimo mazutu BOLLORÉ TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA
Ltd yagombaga kumenya uko bipakiye no ku kuba yaragombaga kubanza kureka bateri
zigashiramo umuriro, naho Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi rushingira icyemezo cyarwo ku
mpamvu yo kuba nta bugenzuzi buhuriweho bwakozwe kugira ngo hamenyekanye niba ibifaru
n’imodoka byaragejejwe mu bwato nta kibazo bifite, Urukiko rurasanga nta shingiro bifite, kuko
nk’uko byasobanuwe haruguru, icyatsinze BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS
RWANDA Ltd yahindutse AFRICAN GLOBAL LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd n’uko yagize
ubuteganye buke bwo kumenya ibyagombaga gukorwa kugira ngo imizigo yahawe iyigeze aho
iyijyanye nta kibazo kibayeho.
[29] Hashingiwe ku bisobanuro bimaze gutangwa, Urukiko rurasanga ubujurire bwa kabiri
bwatanzwe na AFRICAN GLOBAL LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd butakiriwe, kuko yatsinzwe mu
nkiko zombi zabanje hashingiwe ku mpamvu zimwe.
2.Kumenya niba amafaranga y’ikurikiranarubanza n’igihembo cya Avoka asabwa muri uru
rubanza afite ishingiro
[30] Abahagarariye PRIME INSURANCE Ltd bavuga ko AFRICAN GLOBAL LOGISTICS
RWANDA Ltd ikwiye gutegekwa kwishyura PRIME INSURANCE Ltd amafaranga miliyoni
ebyiri (2.000.000 Frw) y’igihembo cya Avoka n’ibihumbi magana atanu (500.000 Frw)
y’ikurikuranarubanza.

[31] Ahagarariye BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd yahindutse
AFRICAN GLOBAL LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd bavuga ko babihariye ubushishozi bw’Urukiko
kuko amafaranga asabwa ari umurengera.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
[32] Ingingo ya 111 y’Itegeko N° 22/2018 ryo ku wa 29/04/2018 ryerekeye imiburanishirize
y’imanza z‘imbonezamubano, iz’ubucuruzi, iz’umurimo n’iz’ubutegetsi iteganya ibikurikira:
“Ikirego cy’amafaranga y’ikurikiranarubanza ni ikirego gishamikira ku kirego cy’iremezo
kigamije kwishyuza ibyakoreshejwe mu rubanza. Ikirego cy’amafaranga y’ikurikiranarubanza
kiburanishirizwa rimwe n’ikirego cy’iremezo. Gishobora kandi kwakirwa kikanaburanishwa n’iyo
ikirego cy’iremezo cyaba kitakiriwe”.
[33] Urukiko rurasanga amafaranga y’igihembo cya Avoka n’ay’ikurikiranarubanza PRIME
INSURANCE Ltd isaba ikwiye kuyahabwa, kuko byabaye ngombwa ko ishaka Avoka wo
kuyiburanira, ariko rukaba rusanga ayo isaba ari menshi harebwe ko urubanza rugarukiye ku
nzitizi y’iburabubasha gusa; bityo mu bushishozi bwarwo rukaba ruyigeneye ibihumbi magana
atanu (500.000 Frw) y’igihembo cya Avoka n’ibihumbi magana abiri (200.000 Frw)
y’ikurikiranarubanza, kuri uru rwego, agomba gutangwa na AFRICAN GLOBAL LOGISTICS
RWANDA Ltd (yahoze yitwa BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd).
III. ICYEMEZO CY’URUKIKO
[34] Rwemeje ko inzitizi y’iburabubasha bw’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire yatanzwe na PRIME
INSURANCE Ltd ifite ishingiro.
[35] Rwemeje ko ubujurire bwa AFRICAN GLOBAL LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd (yahoze
yitwa BOLLORE TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd) butakiriwe kuko butari mu
bubasha bw’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire.
[36] Rutegetse AFRICAN GLOBAL LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd (yahoze yitwa BOLLORE
TRANSPORT AND LOGISTICS RWANDA Ltd) kwishyura PRIME INSURANCE Ltd ibihumbi
magana atanu (500.000Frw) y’igihembo cya Avoka n’ibihumbi magana abiri (200.000 Frw)
y’ikurikiranarubanza, kuri uru rwego.
[37] Ruvuze ko amagarama yatanzwe ahwanye n’ibyakozwe mu rubanza.
